name: the-standard-cancellation-patterns
description: Governs CancellationToken method signatures, token propagation, TryCatch exception handling for OperationCanceledException and TimeoutException, parallel orchestration, and testing standards.
inputs: C# source file with async methods accepting CancellationToken
C# source file with TryCatch exception handling
C# source file with timeout logic
outputs: Style-compliant C# code with correct cancellation and timeout patterns
Validated exception handling for OperationCanceledException and TimeoutException
